name: Walnut Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and let it cool. Beat eggs in a large mixing bowl until light. Add sugar and beat until smooth. Mix in the melted butter thoroughly.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Blend into the butter mixture. Add nuts and vanilla extract; mix thoroughly. The dough will be thick but not firm.
3. Shape the dough into three logs about 2 inches in diameter. Wrap each log in plastic or wax paper. Refrigerate at least overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Slice logs into 1/8-inch thick slices and place on well-greased baking sheets. Bake until golden, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from the oven immediately and transfer to wire racks. Allow to cool completely.
